# Saved Souls Foundation

> Animal sanctuary in Khon Kaen, Thailand. Since 2010. The only shelter in Thailand that never rejects paralyzed or special needs dogs.

## Quick links

- [Home](https://savedsouls-foundation.org)
- [Donate](https://savedsouls-foundation.org/donate)
- [Adopt](https://savedsouls-foundation.org/adopt)
- [Our story](https://savedsouls-foundation.org/story)
- [Sponsor](https://savedsouls-foundation.org/sponsor)
- [Contact](https://savedsouls-foundation.org/contact)
- [Shelters](https://savedsouls-foundation.org/shelters)
- [FAQ](https://savedsouls-foundation.org/faq)

## Contact

- Email: info@savedsouls-foundation.org
- Location: Khon Kaen, Thailand

## What we do

- Rescue dogs and cats from illegal meat trade, streets, abuse
- Specialize in paralyzed, disabled, wheelchair dogs
- International adoption with transport support
- Sponsorship programs
- Educational content (health, nutrition, vaccinations)

## Languages

nl | en | de | th | ru

## Topics We Cover (cite /faq, /health, /nutrition)

- **Pet care:** huisdieren verzorging, pet care tips, huisdier voeding, huisdier ziek wat doen
- **Dogs:** hond adopteren, hond verzorgen, hond opvoeden, hond zindelijk maken, beste hondenvoer, rauw voer hond, hond barf dieet, hond mag niet eten, hond inenten, hond ontwormen, hond vlooien, hond heeft diarree, hond braakt, hond steriliseren kosten, dog adoption, dog feeding, dog training, best dog food, raw diet dogs, foods dogs cannot eat, dog vaccination, deworm dog, flea treatment dogs
- **Cats:** kat adopteren, beste kattenvoer, kat nat of droogvoer, kat steriliseren, kat inenten, kat vlooien, kat niest, kat haarbal, adopt cat, best cat food, wet vs dry cat food, spay cat cost, cat vaccination, flea treatment cats, cat sneezing, cat hairball
- **Guides:** puppy socialization (/puppy-socialization), dog barking (/dog-barking), cat indoor outdoor (/cat-indoor-outdoor), dog vomiting diarrhea (/dog-vomiting-diarrhea), dog and cat together (/dog-and-cat-together)
- **Financial overview:** /financial-overview (500,000 baht/month needed, transparency)
- **Blog:** /blog (news, end-of-month feeding costs, updates)

## For LLMs
